description: PER-AREA ablation power gate (CPU-only): the e-0045 DEAD-at-low-n logic applied per Mathlib area to the within-deep eval route. e-0008's Stage 3 design promises a per-area granularity breakdown, but no gate priced whether the granularity effect is resolvable WITHIN an area vs only pooled. Composes the SAME three deep-route numbers e-0046 used (e-0031 within-deep module-disjoint split x e-0032 substantive-frontier construct x e-0028 per-area round-trip yield) but does NOT pool: computes effective verified-AND-granularity-bearing n + McNemar floor + e-0040 MDE per area. Two filters per area: (i) the >=6-discordant combinatorial CEILING (necessary for McNemar to EVER reject), (ii) the sharper genuinely-powered filter = a REACHABLE 80%-power MDE (gap<=0.50). Also prices the actionable fix: coarsening 17 fine areas into 4 super-areas.
motivation: Every prior Stage-0.5 gate priced the POOLED within-deep effective n (~115, e-0046). e-0008 explicitly plans a per-area ablation; if that sub-claim is under-powered in most areas, Stage 3 would print under-powered per-area placeholders. Enforce the e-0045 floor at the ablation granularity Stage 3 actually reports, before any Modal spend.
formal_results: alpha=0.05 -> need >=6 same-direction discordant pairs. Pooled n_eff~115 (clears w/ margin). FINE (17 areas): 7/17 clear the count CEILING (MeasureTheory n_eff=30, Analysis 27, RingTheory 9, LinearAlgebra/Topology/Algebra 7, NumberTheory 6); only 2/17 GENUINELY POWERED with a reachable 80%-power MDE: MeasureTheory (MDE~0.28) and Analysis (MDE~0.31). The other 5 floor-clearers need a >0.50 gap = effectively unpowered. COARSE super-areas: 3/4 clear floor, 2/4 genuinely powered: Analysis* (n_eff=70, MDE~0.16-0.20) and Algebra* (n_eff=34, MDE~0.25-0.30), covering 90% of GB eval targets; Foundational* clears the count floor (n_eff=6) but MDE unreachable; Discrete* (n_eff=5) fails the floor.
results_description: Per-area ablation is mostly DEAD: genuinely powered in only 2/17 fine areas. Coarsening to super-areas gives 2/4 genuinely powered (Analysis*, Algebra*) covering 90% of granularity-bearing eval targets.
conclusions: RECOMMENDATION for e-0008: report the granularity gap POOLED (the powered headline) and break it down by AT MOST the 2 genuinely-powered super-areas (Analysis*, Algebra*), NOT the 17 fine areas (15 of which would print under-powered placeholders). The per-area gap x model-SIZE interaction is out of reach entirely. CAVEAT: the count floor is a NECESSARY ceiling that over-counts; verified counts are the e-0028 projection; leakage-clean per e-0049.
